top_signals.title: Crucial Japan Bond Sale to Test Market as Global Selloff Deepens
top_signals.summary: Investors are on tenterhooks going into a sale of 20-year Japanese government bonds on Wednesday after concerns over inflation and government spending drove super-long yields to multi-year highs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
